lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior has multiple dents, visible rust, and peeling clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with some tears. Mechanically, the car has persistent engine issues and fluid leaks that need to be addressed before it can be reliably driven. Sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project.

Ready for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable companion for your everyday needs! While it shows some expected wear and tear and could use a little cosmetic attention, it runs steadily and offers a practical solution for your transportation needs. It's an honest car at a great price, perfect for someone who values functionality and potential!
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior shows significant rust and multiple large dents. The interior has torn upholstery and heavy staining. Mechanical components require immediate repair.
This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a solid value for a buyer who doesn't mind a few imperfections. The exterior shows its age with several

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent care. This offering provides a sophisticated driving experience and represents a premier opportunity for those seeking a reliable, high-caliber vehicle that performs with distinction.

Hey there! I'm looking for a new home for my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my trips around town. It drives like a dream and is ready to hit the road with you today—come check it out and see why I've loved it so much!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp through six individual throttle bodies. It is equipped with the desirable Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement using ACL shells. The subframe has been inspected and reinforced with plates to ensure structural rigidity. Suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While showing minor patina consistent with its age, the chassis dynamics remain sharp and the high-revving powerband is perfectly linear.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained sedan offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that retains a beautiful shine, though minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small scratch near the rear wheel well reflect its honest road history. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, kept in a strictly smoke-free environment. Mechanically, the vehicle is in excellent health; it has been serviced regularly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a recent oil change and a fresh set of all-season tires installed just last month. All electronics, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. While it shows the gentle character of a well-loved vehicle, it represents a reliable, high-quality option for a driver who values mechanical integrity and a clean aesthetic. Includes a full service history and two sets of keys.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience and represents a premier acquisition for the discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle stands as a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking quality without compromise. Experience the assurance of a vehicle that has been curated with the utmost professional care.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s as reliable as it is stylish? I’m parting with my favorite car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream, making it the perfect companion for weekend road trips or just zipping around town. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS system. Mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox, the powertrain remains robust with excellent throttle response and consistent compression. The chassis has been addressed with critical rear subframe reinforcement and upgraded polyurethane bushings, ensuring the MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension maintain optimal geometry under lateral load. Equipped with a variable M differential lock for superior mechanical traction, this example presents in honest condition, offering a mechanically sorted driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who prioritizes visceral performance and analog feedback.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic blemishes, while the premium leather interior remains supple and free of any significant wear or odors. All electronic features, including the navigation and premium sound system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound, having undergone regular preventative maintenance; the engine pulls strongly, and the transmission shifts smoothly. Equipped with a complete set of tires with ample tread and a clean title, this car represents a reliable and sophisticated choice for any discerning driver looking for quality without the new-car price tag.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains its original luster, while the interior environment remains sophisticated and well-preserved. Engineered for longevity and presented in commendable mechanical order, this motorcar stands as a testament to diligent ownership. We invite you to experience this exceptional value proposition firsthand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Presented in consistent, high-quality condition with a documented service history, it delivers both reliable performance and a refined aesthetic. Our professional inspection confirms its mechanical integrity, ensuring this model meets the exacting standards of our dealership and offers exceptional value in its class.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This beauty has been super well-loved and is in great shape, running smoothly and looking sharp. It’s the perfect match for someone who wants a quality car without the brand-new price tag. I’ve really enjoyed driving it, and I know you will too! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Presenting a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 power unit. This specimen exhibits crisp throttle response via its factory individual throttle bodies and optimized double VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains composed with a verified rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed suspension bushings. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission to a functional limited-slip differential. Recent comprehensive service includes a critical valve clearance adjustment and a cooling system overhaul to ensure thermodynamic stability. A performance-oriented example with robust mechanical vitals, ready for spirited driving.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and comfort, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a beautiful luster with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use, while the undercarriage remains clean and well-kept. Inside, the cabin is a highlight; the upholstery is free of tears or significant stains, and every electronic component—from the responsive infotainment screen to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a quiet, responsive engine that has benefited from regular oil changes and scheduled inspections. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and confident. This is an ideal choice for a buyer seeking a dependable, turn-key vehicle that looks as good as it drives.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a sophisticated driving experience, this motorcar represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer who demands quality and consistency without compromise.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a superior driving experience, balancing sophisticated engineering with enduring value. It has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and comfort. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. It’s clean, well-loved, and totally ready for its next road trip! If you're looking for a solid, dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, utilizing individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS to deliver a linear power band up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains composed via a MacPherson strut front and five-link rear suspension, while the M Variable Differential Lock ensures optimal torque vectoring across the rear axle. This example is mechanically sound, benefiting from recent preventive maintenance on
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like finish with only the slightest signs of careful road use, while the cabin offers a smoke-free, pristine environment featuring supple leather seating and fully functional high-end tech features. Mechanically, the car has been serviced ahead of schedule; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. Recent maintenance includes a fresh set of premium tires and a comprehensive cooling system flush. This is a turn-key car for a discerning buyer who values mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It offers a seamless blend of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer who prioritizes quality, proven durability, and refined performance.
